response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The song vocals match the reference Japanese lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: The host speaks in English, which was transcribed manually for both original and English fields; the song's Japanese lyrics were transcribed and translated using the reference JSON as guidance. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are strictly timed to the vocal activation, keeping silent during the intro music and transitions. No CC tags are used.

subtitles.original: Good morning! Good afternoon! Good evening, wherever you are in the realms!
subtitles.english: Good morning! Good afternoon! Good evening, wherever you are in the realms!

subtitles.original: Welcome! You're watching "Now That's a Bop" on ERB TV!
subtitles.english: Welcome! You're watching "Now That's a Bop" on ERB TV!

subtitles.original: I'm your host, oh-ho-ho-ho!
subtitles.english: I'm your host, oh-ho-ho-ho!

subtitles.original: Roses are red, the fire of my heart is blue,
subtitles.english: Roses are red, the fire of my heart is blue,

subtitles.original: also known as the Scarlet Queen, the harbinger of order, leader of Justice!
subtitles.english: also known as the Scarlet Queen, the harbinger of order, leader of Justice!

subtitles.original: I am Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame!
subtitles.english: I am Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame!

subtitles.original: Lovely to see you, to see you, lovely!
subtitles.english: Lovely to see you, to see you, lovely!

subtitles.original: We have an excited crowd of Rosarians here! Huzzah!
subtitles.english: We have an excited crowd of Rosarians here! Huzzah!

subtitles.original: And a great crew ready to bring some awesome tunes to you all! Huzzah!
subtitles.english: And a great crew ready to bring some awesome tunes to you all! Huzzah!

subtitles.original: We've got a massive lineup of absolute bop and a halfs.
subtitles.english: We've got a massive lineup of absolute bop and a halfs.

subtitles.original: Tonight we have a special theme. We are celebrating music from the '80s!
subtitles.english: Tonight we have a special theme. We are celebrating music from the '80s!

subtitles.original: Make sure you folks at home, if you're enjoying the show, please let us know using the hashtag...
subtitles.english: Make sure you folks at home, if you're enjoying the show, please let us know using the hashtag...

subtitles.original: #ERBday2026! ERBday 2026, right up there, right up there!
subtitles.english: #ERBday2026! ERBday 2026, right up there, right up there!

subtitles.original: Okay, let's get started with our first bop. Here we go. Are you ready?
subtitles.english: Okay, let's get started with our first bop. Here we go. Are you ready?
